<[autotemplate]
%documentclass={beamer}
usetheme={Madrid}
usepackage=[utf8]{inputenc}
%usepackage={listings}
%usepackage={wasysym}
usepackage={pgf}
usepackage={multimedia}
%%%\usepackage{verbatim}
setbeamercovered={dynamic}
%setbeamercovered={transparent}
titleframe=True
titleframeopts=[plain]
title=[wiki2beamer demo]{An example wiki2beamer presentation}
subtitle={a template and example}
author={Michael Adam / obnoxxx}
institute={Project /Affiliation}
date={\today}
[autotemplate]>

== lists ==


==== A simple frame ====

* with a
* bullet list
*# and two
*# numbered sub-items

==== Another simple frame ====

Uncovering lists:

*<2-> one
*<3-> two
*<4-> three
*<5> four

== more stuff ==

====text blocks ===

<[block]
{ An example text block}
beamer and wiki2beamer offer text blocks
with nice (colored) frames
[block]>


== wrapping == 
==== Finale ====
